message:
fix: gate Linux-only parse_proc_net_unix import behind cfg(target_os = "linux")

The `parse_proc_net_unix` function from the network collector reads
/proc/net/unix, which only exists on Linux. Without the cfg gate, the
import causes a compile warning (or error with deny(unused_imports)) on
macOS and other non-Linux platforms since the function is never called
there. Adding the conditional compilation attribute keeps the import
consistent with the existing cfg-gated call sites that use it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
